nodes.name: 10_purpose-why.md
nodes.summary: Brand discovery reference template for Module 10 covering purpose and 'why', with structured prompts to elicit core beliefs, behavioural values, brand refusals, and founder anchors, then synthesise candidate Why formulations and bridge to positioning.

nodes.name: 20_positioning.md
nodes.summary: Brand discovery reference template for Module 20 covering positioning, with prompts to define target client, competitive category, differentiators, and founder language, then draft a Dunford-style positioning statement with alternative framings.

nodes.name: 30_audience-niche.md
nodes.summary: Brand discovery reference template for Module 30 covering audience and niche definition, with prompts for ideal client profiling, psychographic portraiture, niche hypothesis, and worst-fit client identification.

nodes.name: 40_personality-archetype.md
nodes.summary: Brand discovery reference template for Module 40 covering brand personality and archetype, with prompts for archetype selection, Aaker personality scoring, and behavioural guidelines derived from the archetype.

nodes.name: 50_voice-tone.md
nodes.summary: Brand discovery reference template for Module 50 covering voice and tone, with prompts for admired and disliked copy, banned phrases, voice spectrum positioning, and a tone matrix by content type.

nodes.name: 60_narrative-story.md
nodes.summary: Brand discovery reference template for Module 60 covering brand narrative and origin story, with prompts for founding story, transformational conflict, client story, and Neumeier trueline drafting.

nodes.name: 70_founder-tension.md
nodes.summary: Brand discovery reference template for Module 70 covering the founder-brand versus organisation-brand tension, with prompts for spectrum placement, ownership boundaries, and transition planning.

nodes.name: 90_SYNTHESIS.md
nodes.summary: Master brandbook synthesis template for Module 90 that consolidates outputs from all prior brand discovery modules (Why, Positioning, Audience, Personality, Voice, Narrative, Founder-tension) into a unified Kapferer Identity Prism, resolved tensions, and practical next steps.
